axes.label: Engagement Paradigm
axes.evidence_basis: Hesitant rejections of Gamified progression and RPG.

axes.label: Data Abstraction
axes.evidence_basis: Stated intent avoids spreadsheets; rejected gamification as the alternative.

axes.label: Motivation Driver
axes.evidence_basis: Hesitant rejections of gamified progression suggest exploring non-reward-based motivation.

edge_case_flags: Negative space definition (user knows what they do not want, but not what they do want)

scout_assignments.reason: Determine if visual metaphors or ambient data can replace the spreadsheet feel without feeling like a game.
Explore intrinsic, mindfulness-based financial tracking since extrinsic gamification was rejected.
Test serene, low-friction interactions to see if calm utility is preferred over RPG mechanics.

persona_anima_divergence: User explicitly wants to avoid a spreadsheet (seeking engagement), but hesitantly rejects gamification, suggesting their ideal 'non-spreadsheet' is not 'fun/game' but likely 'calm/beautiful'.
